title: heleniastrum amphibolum
intro: Heleniastrum amphibolum, also known as Indian gentian, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Heleniastrum amphibolum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Heleniastrum amphibolum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
